text.title: Solution Assessment — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does a current baseline exist and is the assessor independent?

conclusion.verdict: block — reconstruct baseline from primary sources first

branch.when: baseline_exists == true AND assessor_independent == true AND stage == 'design'

conclusion.verdict: run post-impl assessment with primary-source evidence

example.trace: ASMT-2026-014 → baseline exists → independent assessor → 90-day stage → run post-impl assessment
